<script setup lang="ts">
import { PinInput, PinInputGroup, PinInputSlot } from "@/ui/pin-input"

import { Example } from "@/components/example"
</script>

<template>
  <Example title="Basic Pin Input">
    <PinInput>
      <PinInputGroup>
        <PinInputSlot v-for="(id, index) in 4" :key="id" :index="index" />
      </PinInputGroup>
    </PinInput>
  </Example>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { ExampleWrapper } from "@/components/example"

import PinInputBasic from "./PinInputBasic.vue"
import PinInputMasked from "./PinInputMasked.vue"
import PinInputWithSeparator from "./PinInputWithSeparator.vue"
</script>

<template>
  <ExampleWrapper>
    <PinInputBasic />
    <PinInputWithSeparator />
    <PinInputMasked />
  </ExampleWrapper>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { PinInput, PinInputGroup, PinInputSlot } from "@/ui/pin-input"

import { Example } from "@/components/example"
</script>

<template>
  <Example title="Masked Pin Input">
    <PinInput :mask="true" type="text">
      <PinInputGroup>
        <PinInputSlot v-for="(id, index) in 6" :key="id" :index="index" />
      </PinInputGroup>
    </PinInput>
  </Example>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import {
  PinInput,
  PinInputGroup,
  PinInputSeparator,
  PinInputSlot,
} from "@/ui/pin-input"

import { Example } from "@/components/example"
</script>

<template>
  <Example title="Pin Input with Separator">
    <PinInput>
      <PinInputGroup>
        <PinInputSlot v-for="(id, index) in 3" :key="id" :index="index" />
      </PinInputGroup>
      <PinInputSeparator />
      <PinInputGroup>
        <PinInputSlot v-for="(id, index) in 3" :key="id" :index="index + 3" />
      </PinInputGroup>
    </PinInput>
  </Example>
</template>
